name: Red Bell Pepper Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and sauté for 2 minutes until translucent.
3. Stir in half of the carrots, the rest of the vegetables (potato, bell pepper), rosemary, fennel, Hungarian paprika, parsley, stock, and soy sauce.
4. Continue to sauté for another 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add the remaining carrots and bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and let simmer for 20 minutes or until all vegetables are tender.
7. Use an immersion blender to puree the soup.
8. Return the pureed soup to the pot and stir well with the rest of the carrots.
9. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
10. Serve hot.
